name: ADAPTIN BIO, INC.
business: Adaptin Bio is a biopharmaceutical company pioneering a transformational approach to enhance the transfer of therapeutics into the brain, facilitating the treatment of brain cancers and other unmet medical conditions. Its lead product candidate, APTN-101, is a proprietary EGFRvIII x CD3 bispecific T cell engager designed to treat glioblastoma multiforme (GBM).

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company pioneering a transformational approach to enhance the transfer of therapeutics into the brain, facilitating the treatment of brain cancers and other unmet medical conditions.

catalysts.event: IRB approval for investigator-initiated, multi-dose clinical trial of APTN-101 in GBM
catalysts.sentence: Received both internal and external Institutional Review Board (IRB) approval for the investigator-initiated, multi-dose clinical trial evaluating APTN-101 in the treatment of glioblastoma multiforme (GBM) in March 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 12,000 glioblastoma patients annually in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, the average annual age-adjusted incidence of glioblastoma is 3.2 per 100,000 population (or about 12,000 patients annually) with an average age of 64 at diagnosis.
